name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_utbl_kpi2_road_safety
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_kpi2_road_safety' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`startpointname` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`startpointname` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Travel-ArrivalOnSiteTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Travel-ArrivalOnSiteTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime2` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime2` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Rectification-EndTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Rectification-EndTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate2` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate2` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Occurrence-OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Occurrence-OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceRecievedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceRecievedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Travel-StartLocation` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Travel-StartLocation` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Travel-StartTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Travel-StartTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Travel-TrafficConditionReportedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Travel-TrafficConditionReportedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DetectedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DetectedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`InitiatedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`InitiatedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTimeDerived` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTimeDerived` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`startpointname` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`startpointname` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`startpointname` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Travel-ArrivalOnSiteTime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Travel-ArrivalOnSiteTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Travel-ArrivalOnSiteTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime2` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime2` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime2` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Initiation-DetectedTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Rectification-EndTime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Rectification-EndTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Rectification-EndTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate2` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate2` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Initiation-InitiatedDate2` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Occurrence-OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Occurrence-OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Occurrence-OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceRecievedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceRecievedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Details-PoliceReferenceRecievedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Travel-StartLocation` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Travel-StartLocation` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Travel-StartLocation` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Travel-StartTime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Travel-StartTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Travel-StartTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Travel-TrafficConditionReportedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Travel-TrafficConditionReportedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Travel-TrafficConditionReportedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DetectedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`DetectedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DetectedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`InitiatedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`InitiatedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`InitiatedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTimeDerived` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTimeDerived` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTimeDerived` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`OccurrenceDateandTime` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'deltautc|modifiedutc|completeddate|createddate|createduser|startpointname|startdistancepast|Travel-ArrivalOnSiteTime|Initiation-DetectedTime2|Initiation-DetectedTime|Rectification-EndTime|Initiation-InitiatedDate|Initiation-InitiatedDate2|Occurrence-OccurrenceDateandTime|Details-PoliceReferenceDate|Details-PoliceReferenceRecievedDate|Travel-StartLocation|Travel-StartTime|Travel-TrafficConditionReportedDate|DetectedDateTime|InitiatedDateTime|OccurrenceDateandTimeDerived|OccurrenceDateandTime' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`utbl_kpi2_road_safety`
